title: Precision Gates the Error Message

runtime.expected_outcome: High pi_1 pulls mu_1 tightly to y; high pi_2 locks mu_1 to mu_2 even if y disagrees. Attention is precision.

audiences.kid: Where you pay attention, the signal matters more. Precision is the spotlight.
audiences.real: In predictive coding, precision is attention -- it gates how strongly each error message propagates. Raise pi_1 -> fast adaptation to y; raise pi_2 -> stubborn top-down prior.
audiences.equation: Update at level k is pi_k * error_k * eta. Raising pi_k scales the update proportionally.
audiences.derivation: Precision is the inverse variance of the Gaussian density on the corresponding error. Variational gradient descent scales updates by precision (Feldman & Friston 2010).

orchestrate.objective: Show attention-as-precision in the 2-level predictive-coding unit.
orchestrate.context: PredictiveCodingPass with y=1; sweep (pi_1, pi_2) in {(10,1), (1,10)}.

credits: Parr, Pezzulo & Friston (2022), Active Inference, MIT Press (CC BY-NC-ND), Ch 5.
Feldman & Friston (2010), Attention, uncertainty, and free-energy.
